title: Delicate Moroccan Fish Pastilla
description: A flavorful and moist Moroccan-inspired fish dish wrapped in a delicate pastry, perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a store-bought or homemade blend that includes cumin and coriander

instructions: Roll out the pastry sheet to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place the rolled-out pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a separate pan, sauté the fish until it's cooked through.
In the same pan, add the Moroccan spice blend, onion, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the cooked fish to the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around it.
Spread the Moroccan spice blend mixture evenly over the fish.
Fold the pastry over the fish, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with butter and make a few cuts on top to allow steam to escape.
Bake the pastilla for 20-25 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove the pastilla from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
